name: DOEH Retail
description: A crisp, product-first retail storefront wired to the DOEH platform. A confident product grid, sign-in and a live rewards balance in the header (DOEH Identity), and a shop → cart → checkout → order flow that produces real DOEH orders (DOEH Commerce). The theme owns all presentation; the plugins own auth, tokens and the Orders API. Requires the DOEH Identity, Commerce and Commerce Storefront plugins.
description_mm: DOEH platform နှင့် ချိတ်ဆက်ထားသော product-first retail storefront။ product grid၊ header တွင် sign-in နှင့် rewards balance (DOEH Identity)၊ shop → cart → checkout → order flow က DOEH order အစစ်များ ဖန်တီးသည် (DOEH Commerce)။ theme က presentation အားလုံးကို ပိုင်ပြီး plugin များက auth, token နှင့် Orders API ကို ပိုင်သည်။ DOEH Identity, Commerce နှင့် Commerce Storefront plugin လိုအပ်သည်။
author: Beyond Plus

settings.name: rt_hero_title
settings.label: Hero headline
settings.placeholder: Shop online, pick up in store.

settings.name: rt_hero_sub
settings.label: Hero subtitle
settings.placeholder: Real stock, real prices, ready when you are.

settings.name: rt_logo
settings.label: Logo
settings.help: Shown in the header instead of the name. Uploads path or full URL; ~36px tall works best.

settings.name: rt_favicon
settings.label: Favicon
settings.help: Browser-tab icon. Uploads path or full URL (PNG/SVG/ICO).

settings.name: rt_show_loyalty
settings.label: Show the rewards section
settings.help: Only appears when DOEH Identity is active anyway; this hides it entirely.

settings.name: rt_grid
settings.label: Product grid density
settings.help: Compact fits more products per row (home and /store).
